prompt: Professional tailor's workshop with dramatic lighting. Center: a mannequin wearing an impeccably tailored, perfectly fitted custom suit in deep navy blue. The fit is flawless and precise. Surrounding it: five other mannequins of different sizes, all wearing the exact same suit but it clearly doesn't fit them - some too tight, some too loose, sleeves wrong length, shoulders misaligned. The contrast between the perfect center fit and the failed fits is dramatic. Cinematic photography, warm lighting, shallow depth of field focusing on the perfect suit, others slightly blurred. Fine art photography style. Physically realistic scene. No text, no labels, no diagrams.
metaphor: A suit tailored perfectly for one mannequin fails on all others—the perfect training fit that cannot generalize.
